title: sticherus hispidus
intro: Sticherus hispidus, also known as the hispid sticherus or the hairy sticherus, is a plant species within the family Gleicheniaceae, belonging to the order Gleicheniales. Sticherus hispidus has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, which contribute to its potential health benefits such as wound healing, pain relief, and immune system support. The plant's roots and leaves are often used in herbal preparations, including decoctions and infusions, to extract its active compounds and utilize its medicinal properties. Additionally, Sticherus hispidus is also used in some traditional medicine practices for its potential to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma.
